title: Scallion Pancake Stir Fry
description: A crispy pancake stir fry with scallions and a side of yam. A twist on the traditional Chinese dish.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the yam slices and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes. Set aside.
In the same skillet, add another tablespoon of olive oil.
Add the chopped scallions and cook until softened, about 2 minutes.
Add the cooked yam slices back into the skillet.
Add the pancake, breaking it into pieces, and stir-fry everything together.
Add the soy sauce, sesame oil, and white pepper. Stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
